method: ADR 0009 D5 — record the Linux CI baseline FIRST; ceilings are baseline p95 plus fixed headroom, set once per roadmap cycle, never ratcheted per item. Scenarios without maxP95Ms are in RECORDING mode: the bench reports them and cannot fail on them. A targetP95Ms records a preregistered target but does not arm enforcement until maxP95Ms is set from comparable evidence.

runner.measurement: hook cold fallback uses a fresh full process; hook resident warm uses a fresh lightweight launcher per sample against the opt-in resident MCP evaluator after one discarded prime and never caches a verdict; cold and one-shot-warm doctor use identical fresh-process argv/tree/cache state; resident doctor starts a fresh ark-check client per sample, reuses only canonical facts, and recomputes live doctor surfaces; --no-cache remains an explicit legacy flag; non-zero child exits abort the run

hook.rationale: Compatibility/recovery path: ark-mcp --hook validates the single proposed file in a fresh full process. Phase Y's 683.761 ms baseline remains the comparison point. Phase Z source 6fa5079 CI run 29649631288 measured 591.165 ms and 595.053 ms on unchanged-head attempts; the frozen 900 ms ceiling retains 51.25% headroom over the worse Phase Z observation and is never ratcheted per item (ADR 0009 D5).

hookResidentWarm.rationale: Z07 source 224a39a / PR synthetic candidate a3d7306, CI run 29700873361 measured 41.487 ms p95 on Linux x64 Node 20 at 10k after one discarded prime. The fresh launcher used the opt-in resident MCP evaluator, cached no verdict, preserved exact output bytes, and left the fixture tree unchanged. The preregistered 65 ms ceiling retains 56.68% runner headroom and is 16.48x below the retained Phase Y 683.761 ms baseline.

doctorCold.rationale: Cold one-shot doctor over the tree. Phase Y's 5,154.522 ms baseline remains the retained comparison point. Phase Z source 6fa5079 CI run 29649631288 measured 5,072.093 ms and 4,799.834 ms on unchanged-head attempts; the frozen 6,800 ms ceiling retains 34.06% headroom over the worse Phase Z observation and is never ratcheted per item (ADR 0009 D5).

doctorOneShotWarm.rationale: Z07 source 778a33a / PR synthetic candidate 9cfcb3a, CI run 29699589991, recorded 2,174.517 ms p95 from fresh doctor processes after one discarded prime, using the exact cold argv and immutable fixture/cache state. This is the like-for-like one-shot warm baseline before a resident implementation; it is not a resident or 10x claim.

doctorResidentWarm.rationale: Z07 preregistered absolute UX target. The canonical-facts resident pilot now reports exact cold/warm JSON, hash, verdict, edit/delete, and invalidation parity, but this lane remains unarmed until comparable Linux evidence is recorded.
